data.name: SA Lead Qualifier & Scorer
data.description: Lead qualification engine for South African property leads. Scores leads on urgency, budget clarity, financing readiness, engagement signals, and conversion probability. Outputs ranked hot lead lists.
data.whenToUse: When a new lead comes in via WhatsApp. Use to score, rank, and prioritize leads for agent follow-up. Also use to re-score existing leads when new signals arrive.
data.skillMdBody:
# SA Lead Qualifier & Scorer

## Purpose
Score every property lead that enters the system through WhatsApp. Produce a ranked list that tells the agent who to call first.

## Scoring Dimensions (0–100 total)

### Budget Clarity (0–25 points)
- 25: Exact budget stated ("R400K")
- 20: Budget range stated ("R350K–R450K")
- 10: Vague budget ("something affordable")
- 5: No budget mentioned

### Timeline/Urgency (0–25 points)
- 25: Immediate — wants to view this week, cash buyer
- 20: 1–3 months — actively looking
- 10: 3–6 months — planning ahead
- 5: 6+ months — casual browsing
- 0: No timeline stated

### Financing Readiness (0–20 points)
- 20: Pre-approved for bond, or confirmed cash buyer
- 15: In process of bond application
- 10: Willing to apply for bond
- 5: Unsure about financing
- 0: Not asked / not answered

### Location Specificity (0–15 points)
- 15: Specific suburb + knows the area well
- 10: General area ("Soweto", "East Rand")
- 5: Vague ("Joburg", "anywhere affordable")
- 0: No location preference

### Engagement Signals (0–15 points)
- 15: Replies within minutes, asks specific questions, sends voice notes
- 10: Replies same day, interested
- 5: Slow replies, minimal engagement
- 0: One message then silent

### Bonus/Penalty Adjustments
- +5: Referred by existing client
- +5: Has viewed properties before
- +3: Sends voice note (shows real engagement in SA context)
- -10: Asks for 'backroom' only (lower commission)
- -10: Clearly shopping around (mentions other agents)
- -20: Unrealistic expectations (R2M budget for Sandton mansion)

## Lead Scoring Tiers

### 🔥 Hot (70–100)
- Action: Agent calls within 1 hour
- Auto-message: "Your agent will call you shortly!"
- Priority: Highest in agent's WhatsApp notifications

### ⏳ Warm (40–69)
- Action: Agent messages within 4 hours
- Auto-response: Property suggestions + follow-up scheduling
- Priority: Normal queue

### 🥶 Cold (0–39)
- Action: Automated drip campaign
- Follow-up: Weekly property alerts
- Priority: No alert to agent

## Lead Scoring Prompt Template

When scoring a lead, use this system prompt:

```
You are a lead scoring engine for a South African real estate agency.

Score this WhatsApp conversation on the following scale (0-100):
- Budget clarity (0-25)
- Timeline urgency (0-25)
- Financing readiness (0-20)
- Location specificity (0-15)
- Engagement signals (0-15)

Return JSON:
{
  "score": 68,
  "tier": "warm",
  "breakdown": {
    "budget_clarity": 20,
    "timeline": 15,
    "financing": 10,
    "location": 10,
    "engagement": 13
  },
  "recommended_action": "send_listings_and_schedule_followup",
  "key_insight": "Buyer knows exactly what they want and where but hasn't secured financing yet — prioritize bond originator referral"
}
```

## Lead Re-Scoring Triggers
Re-score a lead when:
- They re-engage after being cold for 7+ days (+10 bonus for re-engagement)
- They mention a new budget or area preference
- They get pre-approved (auto-bump to Hot)
- A matching property is listed in their preferred area
- They've been in the system for 30+ days with no conversion (penalty: -5)

## Agent Dashboard Output

```
🔥 HOT LEADS (Call Now)
1. Thabo M — Score 85 | Pimville 3-bed R420K | Pre-approved | Texted 10 min ago
2. Sarah K — Score 78 | Diepkloof 2-bed R380K | Cash buyer | Viewed yesterday

⏳ WARM (Message Today)  
3. John D — Score 62 | Soweto 4-bed R650K | Needs bond help
4. Maria N — Score 55 | Lenasia 3-bed R800K | Viewing Saturday

🥶 COLD (Auto Follow-Up)
5-12. (8 leads on automated drip)
```
